title: SQL Generation Messages
text: SQL Generation Messages If SQL generation fails, Uniface reports a warning or error. For details, refer to the following information: Error: No SQL generated, DBMS driver DB not available. Error: No SQL generated for <Entity.Model>, Entity Descriptor not found. Warning: No SQL could be generated for <Entity.Model>, because the ASN file redirects the entity or the path <$Path> to a different DBMS driver Warning: No SQL could be generated for <Entity.Model>, because the ASN file redirects the entity or the path <$Path> to TCP, and the remote installation failed to connect to the requested database driver. Error: No SQL generated, /genSql does not support driver option <Option> as specified in the assignment file, [DRIVER_SETTINGS], USYS$<DB>_PARAMS. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
